title: Pass ownership to a long-lived test orchestrator
prompt: Write `test/my_app/integration/multi_step_test.exs` for an integration test that must execute 3 phases: (1) setup DB state in the test process, (2) hand off ownership to a test orchestrator GenServer that runs 5 async steps, each checking out the DB, (3) hand ownership back to the test for final assertions. Use `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.checkin/1` and `start_owner!/2` to transfer ownership. Must `async: false` because of the hand-off. Include the orchestrator module `MyApp.TestOrchestrator` with a `run/1` function that accepts the owner pid.
tier_rationale: Ownership transfer across three phases — obscure but real pattern.
